title: Home Screen - Device is up to date - Both earbuds are connected
scenario: Home Screen shows "Device is up to date" status with battery levels and green indicators for both earbuds and case on Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on Android
Ensure both earbuds are connected and have the latest firmware installed
Locate the Status Box on the Home screen
Check the 'Device is up to date' status text
Check the battery level indicators for Left, Right, and Case earbuds
Verify the battery indicators are green
Verify the connection status shows 'connected' with a green indicator
Observe the device image in the Status Box
Verify the device image shows both earbuds
Tap the Status Box to expand details
Verify the software version is displayed with a green indicator
expected: Home screen displays 'Device is up to date' status. Status Box shows battery levels for Left, Right, and Case earbuds with green indicators, a 'connected' status with green indicator, and a device image showing both earbuds. Tapping the Status Box reveals a 'Software' field with the software version and green indicator.
